prompt.role: You are a senior DevOps and NestJS engineer.
prompt.task: Create a Docker Compose setup for a NestJS application and a MySQL database.

requirements.requirement: The docker-compose file must define two services: app mysql
The app service must build the NestJS application from a local Dockerfile.
The NestJS application should expose port 3000.
The MySQL service should use the official mysql:8.0 image.
Configure the MySQL container using environment variables: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD MYSQL_DATABASE MYSQL_USER MYSQL_PASSWORD
Persist MySQL data using a named Docker volume.
Configure the NestJS container to connect to the MySQL service using the service name "mysql" as the hostname.
Use depends_on so the app service depends on the mysql service.
Include example environment variables for local development.

The generated output should include:
docker-compose.yml
Dockerfile for NestJS
Example .env file
Brief explanation of each section

prompt.output-format: Return all files in separate code blocks with filenames as headings.
